hero.tagline: I bridge gaps by inspiring confidence and engaging people.
hero.lede: Passionate about clean energy, aerospace innovation, and incorporating human-centered design whenever possible.

items.blurb: Supported the poloidal field magnets for the SPARC tokamak — designed equipment, optimized production processes, and worked alongside operators on the floor.
Worked on circuit card production for missile and radar systems — heat-shielding fixtures, solder stencil optimization, and yield improvements on the floor.
Designing rocket engine components — currently leading work on a coaxial swirl injector for kerosene/GOX combustion.

aboutSection.heading: Hi, I'm Ryan.
aboutSection.lede: I'm a mechanical engineer in Boston, focused on clean energy and aerospace. I love designing equipment that real people use on the floor — and watching it cut hours off a shift.
aboutSection.bio:
I'm currently a Manufacturing Engineer at Commonwealth Fusion Systems, where I support the poloidal field magnets for the SPARC tokamak. Previously I was an Operations Engineering Co-op at Raytheon working on circuit card production for missile and radar systems. I'm also Vice President of Northeastern's Aerospace Club, where I'm leading work on a coaxial swirl injector for a kerosene/GOX rocket engine.

I gravitate toward designs that improve safety and ergonomics for the people who use them. The best mechanical engineering, to me, is invisible — it makes someone's job easier without them ever having to think about it.

items.title: Running
items.body: I love running! I'm the Distance Captain of Northeastern's Running Club. I've recently broken into longer distances — my first 50k last fall, and I ran the Newport Marathon.

items.title: Music
items.body: I have a great appreciation for music. I played trumpet in high school and picked up guitar my junior year.

items.title: Interior Design & Plants
items.body: I have always had an appreciation for small details, and I bring that into the spaces I live in. I also love flowers and plants — over 30 in my apartment.

contactSection.heading: We should talk!
contactSection.body: I'm always up for chatting about clean energy, aerospace, manufacturing, or design. Drop me a line — I read everything.
